title: studio sessions field trip to CHA
excerpt: One of the things I love about being at a tradeshow like CHA is getting to spend time with fans and friends. It's inspiring just connecting with people who share common creative interests. The energy is almost indescribable. Even though…
body:
One of the things I love about being at a tradeshow like CHA is getting to spend time with fans and friends. It's inspiring just connecting with people who share common creative interests. The energy is almost indescribable. Even though I always feel like I am taking plenty of photos, somehow afterward it never seems like enough. To expand on the little recap I did on CHA in this post, we decided to shoot a little video to showcase some of the favorite things Jamie and I spotted while we were there. I didn't get to walk the show floor that much, but when I did, there were so many things that caught my eye. I wish there was a way to bottle up the awesomeness that I felt a couple weeks ago. This video comes close.

If you want to see more details of the Rise & Shine booth and collection - both Scrapbook.com and Paperclipping Roundtable did great wrap ups. The collection should be available in stores sometime in March.

And if you haven't downloaded the free #amytangerinehandbook (how cool are all those first pages and covers?!) by entering your email and name, please do so! We love seeing what you're sharing and plan on featuring some of those posts in an upcoming video. We'd also love if you subscribed to the channel on YouTube as we have some fun projects in the works and you can be the first to find out about them. For those of you who have also taken the time to send an email, thank you! The notes truly brighten our days. And since I am currently on jury duty, the extra dose of sunshine is especially nice!

NOTE: Creativation (formerly CHA)
